message:
feat(cx): add cancel attribution API to Cx

Add methods for accessing cancel attribution information through the
capability context:

- cancel_with(kind, message): Cancel with specific kind and optional message
- cancel_reason(): Get the current cancel reason if any
- cancel_chain(): Iterate over the cause chain
- root_cancel_cause(): Get the root cause of cancellation
- cancelled_by(kind): Check if immediate reason matches kind
- any_cause_is(kind): Check if any cause in chain matches kind
- set_cancel_reason(reason): Set a pre-built cancel reason

Includes 14 unit tests and 1 integration test demonstrating realistic
usage patterns.

Closes: asupersync-9uy4

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
